李星野，参加一场游戏，却穿越到历史古代，本就咸鱼的他，面对被分家，懒懒散散的父母，外加更懒的自己，日子过的特艰难。
他在心理一蛐蛐，貌似，去读书，才能避免高强度的干活。
父母一蛐蛐，貌似做点小生意，也比耪大地要舒服。
一家子相当懒蛋的人，走上了不同的道路。
李星野的父母小生意做着做着有钱了。
李星野读书读着读着，居然读上了状元郎。
本来想着，都是状元郎了，总可以咸鱼了吧。
谁知道，最尊贵的皇帝陛下，直接让他当钦差大臣，直杀的人头滚滚，搅动朝局。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/3930e8fbff064c3e6df4447faef416fe~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"迷糊的静静","author_id":"","book_id":"7594371084095327257","book_name":"科举科举还是科举，翻身大混子","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#480000","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":832,"name":"科举","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=832&name=科举&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":840,"name":"发家致富","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=840&name=发家致富&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7594390348869157401","read_count":"12178","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"412563"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"202","tags":"历史古代,历史,穿越,开局,科举,发家致富","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/09a8797221880f3f88712a70ff51b995~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779446764&x-signature=hpB34zX3bNFfsGlvbFZQm90JmKM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"108845454358","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"232"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323184604CAFAA6DF8B1A487D490F"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读10小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_ count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":15960,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":40963,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":1354},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7608759790572962584","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看完后的一点小建议：
1.第一章看着就觉得憋屈厌蠢的朋友，及时跳到主角归家之后的章节，看一段再决定要不要继续看
2.主角在前几章的“蠢”是有原因的，但是作者铺垫得太长了，虽然没超过十章吧，然后我看了一下评价，很多不足三十分钟的低星评，应该就是前面没有及时解释清楚主角“蠢”的原因，所以弃文的多
3.个人感觉这本文风偏日常风，但是剧情要素还挺多，说不上好坏，得看吃不吃得下这个文，请参照第一条做决定
4.作者更新挺多的，文荒期可以看个够，但如果作为主追更的文的话，我觉得我可以期待作者下一本更成熟的作品"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771556510,"group_id":"7594371084095327257","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"一颗成精的、病歪歪的、只想干饭的瓜","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/e4VgDIOSyMPdepST7l+tHyV0mcYrZ4LysZwxbW4yxZ","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/29763278b1e245e99b9e7cd41d0b5f2b~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776787718&x-signature=AXsjDfeeeQQWi1hFqbbu4hUZcJk%3D","user_id":"2963872973325216","user_name":"吸一口欧气"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2963872973325216","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7594371084095327257","book_info":{"abstract":"科举+发家致富+打野+穿越
